title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0449
summary: 1 This is suit in the Court of Claims under § 902 of the Merchant Marine act of 1936, as amended, 49 Stat. § 1242, to recover the balance of 'just compensation' alleged to be due respondent from the United States for requisition his steam tug, the MacArthur, in October, 1942.
